photo: exports.postStoreRouter = (req, res) => {   const { ownerName, homeName, price, rating, location, photo } = req.body;   const home = new Home(ownerName, homeName, price, rating, location, photo);   home.save();   Home.fetchAll((homes) => {     res.render("store/homeCard", {       title: "home details",       homes: homes,     });   }); };
